title: Deutzia esquirolii
taxonomy: Deutzia esquirolii is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangeaceae. It is native to China and is commonly known as the Chinese fringe flower or the white weeping deutzia. The genus Deutzia is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the deutzias or the fringetrees. These plants are known for their showy white or pink flowers that bloom in the spring and early summer. They are often used as ornamental plants in gardens and landscapes due to their attractive flowers and foliage.
uses: Deutzia esquirolii, also known as Esquiroli's deutzia, has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its potential health benefits.
